meta.description: Index of the data directory: reference bundles, tracked samples, and local-only exports.

reference.purpose: Versioned JSON consumed by the application; EDGAR API shapes, taxonomy list, and financial concept model.
reference.regenerate_notes: Merges live SEC companyfacts/submissions/companyconcept data; set USER_AGENT_EMAIL. Preserves hand-authored sections; updates meta.generated_from_edgar and taxonomies list. Use --with-accounting to also merge reference/sources/accounting into generated/us_gaap_account_map.json.

samples.purpose: Small tracked files for docs and experiments.

local.purpose: Gitignored workspace for large CRM/ERP exports and script I/O (except .gitkeep).
